creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Ruslan,

I can't reproduce this error.  I tested on 10.1-{amd64|i386} and 9.3-amd64 and it installs cleanly on all of them.  Output of "make configure" is included below.

What platform are you using?  Are your packages all up-to-date?

Thanks much,

   Jason
